description: Verifies that JS built-ins (.length, .some, .map, .filter) fail to compile in dotnet mode. Run with scripts/harness/run-negative-tests.sh
expectedErrors: does not contain a definition for 'length'
JavaScript surface member 'length' is not available in the active surface
JavaScript surface member 'slice' is not available in the active surface
does not contain a definition for 'some'
does not contain a definition for 'map'
does not contain a definition for 'filter'
